coverage_explanation: The existing eucn:Wine class already captures the core concept of CN heading 2204 (wine of fresh grapes, including fortified wines and grape must with fermentation arrested by alcohol). The restriction added here further grounds the discriminating production process (GrapeFermentation) that distinguishes heading 2204 from sibling headings in Chapter 22. However, two criteria from the legal text cannot be fully captured: (1) the explicit exclusion of grape must of heading 2009 (unfermented grape juice) — a complement/disjointness axiom with a 2009-heading class would be needed, but no such class exists in the TBox; (2) the cross-reference to Additional Note 2(a) concerning 'actual alcoholic strength by volume' is purely administrative and cannot be expressed as a class restriction. Coverage is therefore partial (~0.72).
